Shrimps: photo index

crustacea text index | photo index Phylum Arthropoda

Subphylum Crustacea > Class Malacostraca Order Decapoda Photo index of crustaceans on Singapore shores

shrimps and shrimp-like <3cm
including snapping shrimps, anemoneshrimps

prawns, shrimp, lobsters >3cm
including mudlobster, ghost shrimp, mantis shrimp

photo index of
crustaceans on this site

all crustaceans

Shrimps
all shrimps, prawns, lobsters and shrimp-like

small < 3cm
large > 3cm
